---
title: "gm_client.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\src\games\odin_protocol\engine\gm_client.py"
loc: 98
complexity: 5
logic_score: 3.23
style_score: 3.73
intel_score: 7.93
overall_score: 4.54
---

## Intent
The `gm_client.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on OdinGM, __init__, generate_scenario, describe_outcome, scientist_query. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via OdinGM, __init__, generate_scenario, describe_outcome, scientist_query. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 3.2/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.7/10
- **Intel [I]**: 7.9/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 6 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [json](file://json)
- [logging](file://logging)
- [os](file://os)
- [typing](file://typing)
- [google](file://google)
- [google.genai](file://google.genai)
- [src.games.odin_protocol.engine.scenarios](file://src.games.odin_protocol.engine.scenarios)

### Exports
- `OdinGM`
- `__init__`
- `generate_scenario`
- `describe_outcome`
- `scientist_query`
